RECURRING ANNUAL — July 30

Full name: George "Buddy" Guy
Role: Blues guitarist / Chicago blues legend
Country of origin: USA (Lettsworth, Louisiana → Chicago)
Greeting language: English
Born: July 30, 1936
This year is his 90th — the Oct 1, 2026 Radio City "90th Birthday Concert" is the milestone celebration (10 weeks after the actual birthday, which is July 30).
Source: Britannica, Wikipedia, Buddy Guy official
